supply_chain.dependencies: One class of similar products accounted for approximately 15 percent of total revenues and one individual vendor provided 12 percent of total purchases
supply_chain.risks: Disruptions in supply chain and distribution network could adversely impact ability to receive and distribute inventory in a timely manner. Ports, rails and domestic long-hauls have been negatively impacted by capacity constraints, congestion and delays, periodic labor disputes, security issues, weather-related events, and natural disasters. Risks associated with products sourced outside the U.S. including civil unrest, acts of war, currency fluctuations, disruptions in maritime lanes, port labor disputes, economic instability in supplier countries, financial instability of suppliers, labor practices issues, availability and cost of raw materials, increased import duties or tariffs, merchandise quality or safety issues, shipping and transport availability and cost, increases in wage rates and taxes, transport security, foreign trade policies, trade sanctions, import limitations

regulatory_risks: Marketing and sale of products regulations
Proper handling and disposal of hazardous materials (used oil, oil filter and battery recycling programs)
Occupational health and safety regulations
Environmental matters regulations
Labor and employment laws
Employee wages and benefits regulations (minimum wage, benefits, scheduling requirements, overtime exemptions)
Information security and data privacy laws (multiple states have passed data protection laws)
Real property regulations
Financial reporting and disclosure requirements
Antitrust and fair competition laws
International trade regulations
Transportation, logistics and delivery operations regulations
Climate change related legislative and regulatory proposals (GHG emissions reporting and reduction requirements)
Fuel economy requirements
Federal or state restrictions on emissions of carbon dioxide
Federal or state incentive programs for vehicles
Regulations on automobile fuels
Access restrictions to telematics and diagnostic tools and repair information imposed by original vehicle manufacturers or governmental regulation
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act compliance
Local anti-bribery and anti-corruption laws
Pillar Two global minimum tax rules (15% minimum tax)
ESG mandatory and voluntary reporting requirements
National Labor Relations Board (NLRB) decisions affecting unionization

sanction_risks: Trade sanctions impact on imported products
Import limitations on certain types of goods or goods containing certain materials from other countries
